Thanks,
Sam @ Support Team

subject: Pricing question before we commit
incoming_email:
Hi,

We're Fernhill Devices and evaluating your product for a small team of 3. Could you share your pricing tiers and whether there's a discount for annual billing? Also, do you support SSO?

Emma Kim
sent_reply:
Hi Emma,

Great to hear from you! For a team of your size, our Team plan is the best fit at $29/user/month billed monthly, or $24/user/month if billed annually (about a 17% saving). SSO (SAML) is included on the Team plan. Happy to set up a 20-minute call this week to answer any other questions — would Tuesday or Wednesday afternoon work?

Best,
Alex from Support

Warm regards,
Jordan, Customer Care

We're Fernhill Devices and evaluating your product for a team of 8. Could you share your pricing tiers and whether there's a discount for annual billing? Also, do you support SSO?

Priya Ivanov
sent_reply:
Hi Priya,

Great to hear from you! For a team of your size, our Team plan is the best fit at $29/user/month billed monthly, or $24/user/month if billed annually (about a 17% saving). SSO (SAML) is available as an add-on on the Team plan, or included on Enterprise. Happy to set up a 20-minute call this week to answer any other questions — would Tuesday or Wednesday afternoon work?

Best,
Alex from Support
